props.ChoiceText: A full winter of mouths, candles, meat, and grain fit into your head long before it fit into the ledger.
props.ChoiceBio: Planning winter stores taught you that comfort is an administrative achievement.

0.TransitionText: Because planning winter stores taught you that comfort is an administrative achievement, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: A supplier, cook, or steward of another house still remembers how well your stores held.

1.TargetText: Someone in provisioning still sends quiet notice when scarcity approaches.
